item.title: New Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
item.description: A look at the build and setup of a new heavy-duty parts washer for industrial workshop use. The video highlights fabrication details and workshop functionality. What feature would matter most in a parts washer?

media:content.media:title: New Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
media:content.media:description: A look at the build and setup of a new heavy-duty parts washer for industrial workshop use. The video highlights fabrication details and workshop functionality. What feature would matter most in a parts washer?

item.title: Fabricating a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
item.description: A fabrication project focused on building a heavy-duty parts washer designed for workshop and machinery cleaning. The video covers construction, welding, and assembly work. What workshop tool do you think saves the most time?

media:content.media:title: Fabricating a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
media:content.media:description: A fabrication project focused on building a heavy-duty parts washer designed for workshop and machinery cleaning. The video covers construction, welding, and assembly work. What workshop tool do you think saves the most time?

item.title: A Simple Upgrade Takes an Unexpected Turn
item.description: What starts as a straightforward workshop upgrade quickly becomes a more involved repair and fabrication project. The video follows the process, challenges, and problem-solving along the way. Have you ever had a small project turn into a bigger job?

media:content.media:title: A Simple Upgrade Takes an Unexpected Turn
media:content.media:description: What starts as a straightforward workshop upgrade quickly becomes a more involved repair and fabrication project. The video follows the process, challenges, and problem-solving along the way. Have you ever had a small project turn into a bigger job?

item.title: Fixing a Noisy Machine Component
item.description: A detailed repair project focused on diagnosing and fixing a noisy mechanical component in a workshop setting. The video highlights inspection, machining, and practical repair work. What’s usually the hardest part of troubleshooting equipment noise?

media:content.media:title: Fixing a Noisy Machine Component
media:content.media:description: A detailed repair project focused on diagnosing and fixing a noisy mechanical component in a workshop setting. The video highlights inspection, machining, and practical repair work. What’s usually the hardest part of troubleshooting equipment noise?

item.title: Surprises Inside This Lathe
item.description: Opening up and inspecting a lathe reveals unexpected wear, modifications, or hidden problems inside the machine. What surprises were hiding beneath the surface?

media:content.media:title: Surprises Inside This Lathe
media:content.media:description: Opening up and inspecting a lathe reveals unexpected wear, modifications, or hidden problems inside the machine. What surprises were hiding beneath the surface?

item.title: Franna Crane Split Apart
item.description: Major repair work begins as a Franna crane is split for inspection, maintenance, or component replacement. What issues require machinery this large to be separated?

media:content.media:title: Franna Crane Split Apart
media:content.media:description: Major repair work begins as a Franna crane is split for inspection, maintenance, or component replacement. What issues require machinery this large to be separated?

item.title: Final build of a heavy duty parts washer
item.description: The final assembly and finishing touches are completed on a custom-built heavy-duty parts washer for workshop use. What features make it ready for industrial cleaning?

media:content.media:title: Final build of a heavy duty parts washer
media:content.media:description: The final assembly and finishing touches are completed on a custom-built heavy-duty parts washer for workshop use. What features make it ready for industrial cleaning?

item.title: Riser Block Upgrade
item.description: A machine upgrade involving a custom riser block improves capacity, alignment, and workshop performance. How does a riser block change machine capability?

media:content.media:title: Riser Block Upgrade
media:content.media:description: A machine upgrade involving a custom riser block improves capacity, alignment, and workshop performance. How does a riser block change machine capability?

item.title: Heavy-Duty Welding Project
item.description: Precision welding and fabrication work come together on a demanding heavy equipment repair project. What challenges appear once the welding begins?

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Welding Project
media:content.media:description: Precision welding and fabrication work come together on a demanding heavy equipment repair project. What challenges appear once the welding begins?

item.title: SIP Hydroptic 6 Precision Machine
item.description: The legendary SIP Hydroptic 6 showcases ultra-precise machining capabilities and engineering accuracy in workshop applications. What made this machine such a benchmark in precision manufacturing?

media:content.media:title: SIP Hydroptic 6 Precision Machine
media:content.media:description: The legendary SIP Hydroptic 6 showcases ultra-precise machining capabilities and engineering accuracy in workshop applications. What made this machine such a benchmark in precision manufacturing?

item.title: Precision Machining on a 2-Metre Bar
item.description: Accurate hole machining is carried out on a massive 2-metre bar requiring careful alignment and setup. How do machinists maintain precision on oversized components?

media:content.media:title: Precision Machining on a 2-Metre Bar
media:content.media:description: Accurate hole machining is carried out on a massive 2-metre bar requiring careful alignment and setup. How do machinists maintain precision on oversized components?

item.title: Heavy Cylinder Repair
item.description: Extensive machining and repair work restore a damaged hydraulic cylinder back to working condition. What steps are critical in major cylinder rebuilds?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Cylinder Repair
media:content.media:description: Extensive machining and repair work restore a damaged hydraulic cylinder back to working condition. What steps are critical in major cylinder rebuilds?

item.title: Building Workshop Storage Bins
item.description: Workshop tools and fabrication techniques are used to create custom bins for better storage and organization. What makes shop-built storage so practical?

media:content.media:title: Building Workshop Storage Bins
media:content.media:description: Workshop tools and fabrication techniques are used to create custom bins for better storage and organization. What makes shop-built storage so practical?

item.title: From Scrap to a BT50 Tool Holder
item.description: Scrap material gets transformed into a custom BT50 tool holder through careful machining and workshop creativity. How much precision goes into making tooling from scratch?

media:content.media:title: From Scrap to a BT50 Tool Holder
media:content.media:description: Scrap material gets transformed into a custom BT50 tool holder through careful machining and workshop creativity. How much precision goes into making tooling from scratch?

item.title: Testing the new I450 Arc Spray Machine
item.description: The new I450 arc spray machine gets its first real workshop test to evaluate coating performance and repair capabilities. How effective is arc spraying for restoring worn parts?

media:content.media:title: Testing the new I450 Arc Spray Machine
media:content.media:description: The new I450 arc spray machine gets its first real workshop test to evaluate coating performance and repair capabilities. How effective is arc spraying for restoring worn parts?

item.title: Milling a Robot Stand on the Jig Borer
item.description: Precision milling work on a jig borer is used to create a sturdy and accurate stand for robotic equipment. Why are jig borers still valued for high-precision work?

media:content.media:title: Milling a Robot Stand on the Jig Borer
media:content.media:description: Precision milling work on a jig borer is used to create a sturdy and accurate stand for robotic equipment. Why are jig borers still valued for high-precision work?

item.title: Workshop Pump Rebuild Challenge
item.description: Unexpected issues and precision work turn a routine pump rebuild into a demanding workshop challenge. What problems show up once the teardown begins?

media:content.media:title: Workshop Pump Rebuild Challenge
media:content.media:description: Unexpected issues and precision work turn a routine pump rebuild into a demanding workshop challenge. What problems show up once the teardown begins?
